metric_notes.total_bytes: Exact sum(totalBytes) on FAST .ts video segment rows at platform/channel grain.
metric_notes.status_200_total_bytes: Exact sum(totalBytes) where HTTP status is 200.
metric_notes.body_bytes: Exact sum(bytes), kept as body-byte debug evidence.
metric_notes.response_content_len: Exact sum(rspContentLen), kept as response-length debug evidence.
metric_notes.rows_with_total_bytes: Rows contributing a non-null totalBytes value.
metric_notes.channel_evidence: path_map/host_map are mapped; unmapped_path_candidate stays visible as channel_name=Other.
